problem id: b8954f14
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01111100 -> 11110111
  01010101 -> 01010001
  00000010 -> 00001000
  11110001 -> 11001011
  00111110 -> 11111011
  10110010 -> 11000011
  10011110 -> 01110001
  00101000 -> 10100010
  10100110 -> 10010010
  00111100 -> 11110011

query: 01110001
predicted answer: 11000011
